revision.comment: add support for templatestyles, see main template adjustments; remove substability
revision.text: <noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

<noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

<noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Col-break here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Col-break for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude/> | class="col-break {{{class|}}}"<!-- see [[Template:Col-begin/styles.css]] --> {{#if:{{{width|}}}{{{align|}}}{{{gap|}}}{{{valign|}}}{{{style|}}}|style="{{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}{{#if:{{{align|}}}|text-align: {{{align}}};}} {{#if: {{{gap|}}}|padding-left: {{{gap}}};}}{{#if:{{{valign|}}}|vertical-align: {{{valign}}};}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}"}} | <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>
